zh.lifeSummary: 當Susan Poley於大約1543年出生在英國素福爾可巴德利時，她的父親John Poley33歲，母親Anne Agnes Wentworth24歲。她於1561年與Thomas Crofts Esquire在英國素福爾可蕾托 薩可哈姆結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1603年9月13日在英國素福爾可享年61歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可蕾托 薩可哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Susan Poley于大约1543年出生在英国素福爾可巴德利时，她的父亲John Poley33岁，母亲Anne Agnes Wentworth24岁。她于1561年与Thomas Crofts Esquire在英国素福爾可蕾托 薩可哈姆结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1603年9月13日在英国素福爾可享年61岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可蕾托 薩可哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Poley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Nord): from a variant of Polet, a vernacular pet form of the personal name Paul . This surname is very rare in France.
East German: habitational name from a place so named near Frankfurt on the Oder.

variants.name: Paul
meanings: English, French, German, Dutch, Swedish, West Indian (mainly Haiti, also e.g. Saint Lucia), and African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the personal name Paul (from Latin Paulus ‘small’), which has always been popular in Christendom. It was the name adopted by the Pharisee Saul of Tarsus after his conversion to Christianity on the road to Damascus in about AD 34. He was a most energetic missionary to the Gentiles in the Roman Empire, and played a very significant role in establishing Christianity as a major world religion. The name was borne also by numerous other early Christian saints. It is also occasionally borne by Jews; the reasons for this are not clear. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages and their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Greek Pavlis , Slovenian Pavel and Pavlič (see Pavlic ), Polish Paweł (see Pawel ) and Pawlicki , Assyrian/Chaldean Polous and Polus . In France, this surname is most common in Brittany (see 2 below).
Breton (mainly Finistère): from a Frenchified form of the personal name Paol, Breton form of Paul .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phóil ‘son of Paul’. Compare McFall .

nameMeanings.name: Susan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of   Susanna .  Among well-known bearers are the American film stars  Susan Hayward  (  1918–75 ) and  Susan Sarandon  (  b. 1946  as  Susan Tomalin ).

variants.name: Suzan
meanings: vernacular form of   Susanna .  Among well-known bearers are the American film stars  Susan Hayward  (  1918–75 ) and  Susan Sarandon  (  b. 1946  as  Susan Tomalin ).

variants.name: Susanna
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Susan Poley was born about 1543, in Badley, Suffolk, England, her father, John Poley, was 33 and her mother, Anne Agnes Wentworth, was 24. She married Thomas Crofts Esquire in 1561, in Little Saxham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 13 September 1603, in Suffolk, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Little Saxham, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Susan Poley est née environ 1543, à Badley, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Poley, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Anne Agnes Wentworth, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Crofts Esquire en 1561, à Little Saxham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 septembre 1603, à Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Little Saxham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Susan Poleyが約1543年にイギリススフォルクバドリーで生まれた時，父John Poleyは33歳，母Anne Agnes Wentworthは24歳であった。1561年にイギリススフォルクリットル サクスハムでThomas Crofts Esquireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1603年9月13日にイギリススフォルクで61歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクリットル サクスハムにて埋葬された。

ko.St. James', Great Grimsby, Lincoln, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 그리트 그림스비 스트 메리 앤드 스트 자메스
ko.lifeSummary: Susan Poley(이)가 대략 1543년 영국 수폴크 바들리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Poley(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Agnes Wentworth(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1561년 영국 수폴크 리틀 사스함에서 Thomas Crofts Esquire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1603년 9월 13일 영국 수폴크에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 리틀 사스함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Susan Poley nasceu aproximadamente 1543, em Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Poley, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Anne Agnes Wentworth, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Crofts Esquire em 1561, em Little Saxham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de setembro de 1603, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Little Saxham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.St. James', Great Grimsby, Lincoln, Engl: грит гримсби ст мэри анд ст джемесь, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Susan Poley родилась около 1543 г. в местности бадли, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Poley было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Agnes Wentworth, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Crofts Esquire в 1561 г. в местности литл саксхам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 13 сентября 1603 г. в местности суффолк, Англия в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности литл саксхам, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Susan Poley nació aproximadamente 1543, en Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Poley, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Anne Agnes Wentworth, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Thomas Crofts Esquire en 1561, en Little Saxham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 13 de septiembre de 1603, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Little Saxham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
